message:
refactor(fcp-tailscale): convert zone_to_tag to fallible interface

Changes panicking functions to return Results for better error handling:

- `zone_to_tag()`: Now returns `TailscaleResult<TailscaleTag>` instead
  of panicking on invalid zone IDs. Delegates to `try_zone_to_tag()`.

- `zone_access_rule()`: Now returns `TailscaleResult<ZoneAclRule>` to
  propagate tag conversion errors.

- `all_zone_rules()`: Now returns `TailscaleResult<Vec<ZoneAclRule>>`
  using iterator collection with Result propagation.

Updated all test cases to handle the new Result types with `.unwrap()`.
The doc example also updated to show proper error handling.

This change aligns with Rust's convention of avoiding panics in library
code and gives callers control over error handling strategy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
